# Predictiv AI Inc. — Institutional Research

## Company Snapshot
- Company: Predictiv AI Inc.
- Tickers: CSE: PAI · FWB: 7IT
- Sector: Vertical AI / SaaS
- Headquarters: Toronto, Ontario, Canada
- Investor Relations: AGORACOM
- Publisher: Omnia Capital Partners Ltd.

## Business
Predictiv AI is a Canadian vertical AI company building production-grade software across fleet telematics, voice/chat automation and real estate intelligence. The Company operates six commercial product lines: Shift Technologies (logistics), Shiftmatics (fleet), CloudRep (voice/chat/SMS agents), Housestack and Housefax (real estate), and Weather Telematics.

## Key Catalyst — Shift × Arcasia Holdings JV (April 2026)
A 51/49 joint venture between Predictiv AI's Shift Technologies and Arcasia Holdings (Pvt) Ltd, the family office led by Aravinda De Silva. The JV is designed to deploy Shift's AI-powered logistics platform directly inside Arcasia Holdings' South Asian operating ecosystem of logistics, e-commerce, distribution and infrastructure businesses.

## Important
This material is research and analysis only. It is not investment advice and contains no price target, rating, or recommendation. Investing in junior listed issuers carries above-average risk and volatility, including potential total loss of capital.
